page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Neuroinformatics for Personalized Medicine toolBox (NeuroPM-box) is a free cross-platform user-friendly multitool software for advanced integration of molecular, histopathological, multimodal neuroimaging, and therapeutic data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Neuroinformatics for Personalized Medicine toolBox (NeuroPM-box) is a free cross-platform user-friendly multitool software for advanced integration of molecular, histopathological, multimodal neuroimaging, and therapeutic data.
